meta.label: End-of-Year Identity Synthesis Skeleton
meta.intent: Extract signal, not sentiment. Behaviors > stories.

framework_overview.description: A neutral, reusable skeleton to turn a chaotic year into identity signal, doctrine, and forward constraints.

sections.title: Top N Insights
sections.definition: Things that became true through repetition, not theory.
sections.prompt_hint: What did reality force you to accept this year?

sections.title: Top N Roasts
sections.definition: Observed contradictions between intention and behavior.
sections.prompt_hint: Where did your actions quietly expose you?

sections.title: Top N Maladaptive Behaviors (formerly 'Fears')
sections.definition: Avoidance, overuse, or compensatory behaviors that shaped outcomes.
sections.prompt_hint: What patterns cost you energy, clarity, or time?

sections.title: Major System Stress Events
sections.definition: Moments where systems, relationships, or identity cracked.

sections.title: Single-Word Identity & Values
sections.definition: Words that survived pressure and guided decisions.
sections.prompt_hint: Which words still feel true after the year?

sections.title: Top Creations / Artifacts
sections.definition: Things you actually built, shipped, or formalized.
sections.prompt_hint: What exists now that didn't before?

sections.title: One Non-Obvious Pattern
sections.definition: A meta-observation you wouldn't have seen alone.

sections.title: Practices Worth Religious Consistency
sections.definition: Skills or behaviors that compound disproportionately.

sections.title: One Rule to Carry Forward
sections.definition: A constraint that should govern future decisions.
sections.prompt_hint: What rule would have prevented most damage?

sections.title: Last-24-Hours Decisions
sections.definition: Actions under extreme constraint reveal true leverage.
sections.prompt_hint: If time collapsed, what still matters?

sections.title: Identity Compression Paragraph
sections.definition: A name-less, role-less description of who emerged.
sections.prompt_hint: Describe the pattern, not the persona.
